decks.notes: The focus of this deck is to outlast your opponent by utilizing control spells and creatures. By countering their spells, removing their threats, and drawing cards with efficient creatures like Augur of Bolas and Spellstutter Sprite, you can maintain the upper hand in the game. Utilizing cards like Snuff Out and Agony Warp to deal with threats, as well as card advantage engines like Brainstorm, this deck aims to control the pace of the game and win through attrition. Additionally, cards like Contaminated Aquifer and Bojuka Bog help disrupt your opponent's game plan while setting up your own.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using a combination of burn spells and aggressive creatures. The goal is to reduce the opponent's life total as rapidly as possible by casting cheap burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper, as well as utilizing cards like Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather to chip away at their life total. Grab the Prize can help to remove blockers or threats, while Highway Robbery can provide additional damage. Faithless Looting helps to dig for more burn spells and maximize damage output.

The main focus of this Pauper 1 vs 1 Aggro - Elves deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of Elf creatures, utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania to generate mana quickly. Cards like Timberwatch Elf and Nyxborn Hydra provide efficient beaters, while Lead the Stampede helps refill the hand with more Elves. The deck also includes some utility creatures like Masked Vandal and Avenging Hunter for removal and added aggression. Overall, the deck aims to flood the board with Elves and use their synergy to quickly defeat the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using counterspells and removal spells to disrupt the opponent's plans. The deck also utilizes cards like Ephemerate to generate value by blinking creatures like Augur of Bolas and Archaeomancer. Additionally, there are cards like Murmuring Mystic and Bender's Waterskin to provide additional win conditions through creature tokens and card draw. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent while maintaining control of the game state.

The main concept of this deck is to efficiently ramp up mana using cards like Gatecreeper Vine, Saruli Caretaker, and Overgrown Battlement, while generating card advantage with Lead the Stampede and Winding Way to find combo pieces like Balustrade Spy and Dread Return. Once the combo is assembled, Balustrade Spy can mill the entire library, and Dread Return can bring back Lotleth Giant to deal lethal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Mesmeric Fiend to disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly inflict damage to the opponent using aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck includes powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt, Fireblast, and Fiery Temper to control the board and finish off the opponent. Aggressive creatures like Kessig Flamebreather and Voldaren Epicure help pressure the opponent while cards like Sneaky Snacker and Guttersnipe provide additional value and damage. With a low mana curve and efficient removal spells, this deck aims to quickly close out the game before the opponent can establish their own board presence.

This deck focuses on utilizing cheap and efficient spells to control the board while deploying powerful threats like Tolarian Terror and Cryptic Serpent. By utilizing card draw spells like Ponder, Thought Scour, and Brainstorm, the deck aims to maintain board advantage while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells and bounce effects like Vapor Snag. The inclusion of Murmuring Mystic provides additional threats while Sleep of the Dead and Deem Inferior help to stabilize the board and protect your creatures. Overall, the Mono Blue Terror deck aims to out-value and out-last the opponent in a battle of attrition.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the powerful Urzatron lands (Urza's Tower, Power Plant, and Mine) to generate a large amount of mana quickly. This allows the player to cast big and impactful creatures like Bramble Wurm, Maelstrom Colossus, and Pinnacle Kill-Ship. The deck also includes control elements like Barrels of Blasting Jelly and Unfathomable Truths to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, cards like Expedition Map and Ancient Stirrings help to find the necessary pieces to assemble the Urzatron lands efficiently.

This deck focuses on quickly building up artifact creatures and sacrificing them for value, using cards like Makeshift Munitions and Nihil Spellbomb. By combining aggressive creatures like Myr Enforcer with powerful spells like Galvanic Blast, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast, efficient threats. With a mix of mana fixing and card draw cards like Thoughtcast, the deck aims to maintain consistency and pressure throughout the game. Additionally, the deck includes key synergy cards like Krark-Clan Shaman and Reckoner's Bargain to further enhance its strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent using cheap burn spells and aggressive creatures. By combining direct damage spells like Fireblast and Lightning Bolt with creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Kessig Flamebreather, the deck aims to pressure the opponent's life total while maintaining card advantage with cards like Grab the Prize and Faithless Looting. The synergy between cards like Sneaky Snacker and Guttersnipe also helps to maximize the damage output. Overall, the deck aims to win the game as quickly as possible through a combination of burn spells and aggressive creatures.

The main focus of this deck is to deploy a fast and aggressive strategy using low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. By maximizing the efficiency of mana and utilizing cards like Burning-Tree Emissary and Goblin Bushwhacker, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a steady stream of creatures and direct damage spells. With a mix of creatures, burn spells, and support cards like Rally at the Hornburg, this deck is designed to maintain pressure and close out games quickly.

The deck focuses on using artifact creatures and spells to quickly build a board presence and deal damage to the opponent. By sacrificing artifacts for additional damage with cards like Makeshift Munitions and Galvanic Blast, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures and burn spells. The deck also includes card draw and recursion elements with cards like Ichor Wellspring and Refurbished Familiar to ensure a steady flow of resources. With a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells, this deck aims to close out the game quickly and efficiently.

This deck focuses on dealing damage to the opponent quickly through a combination of direct burn spells and aggressive creatures. The strategy is to apply pressure early in the game with cheap spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper, while using creatures like Guttersnipe and Voldaren Epicure to maximize damage output. Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery provide additional ways to deal damage and maintain card advantage. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of direct damage spells and aggressive creatures before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through the use of gates and other cards that manipulate the board state. By using a combination of creatures like Sacred Cat and Sneaky Snacker, along with removal spells like Journey to Nowhere and Seal of Fire, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while generating incremental advantage. The inclusion of Writhing Chrysalis and Basilisk Gate further enhances the control aspect of the deck, allowing for flexibility in dealing with threats. Ultimately, the goal is to outlast the opponent and secure victory through careful resource management.

The focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using aggressive creatures and burn spells. The strategy involves using efficient burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast to quickly reduce the opponent's life total while also using creatures like Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather to deal additional damage. Sneaky Snacker and Voldaren Epicure provide additional creatures to pressure the opponent, while cards like Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery can help to maintain card advantage. Faithless Looting and Lava Dart provide card selection and extra reach, allowing the deck to close out games quickly.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with low-cost, efficient creatures and spells to deal damage quickly and efficiently. By utilizing cards like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast for direct damage, alongside aggressive creatures like Thraben Inspector, Glint Hawk, and Kor Skyfisher, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while maintaining card advantage through cards like Melded Moxite. The inclusion of artifact hate like Relic of Progenitus and disruption spells like Journey to Nowhere also helps in controlling the game and securing a path to victory.
